listeningStage2Data.sentence: The brave knight has _______ defeated the dragon before the king arrived.
listeningStage2Data.hint: have/has 之後常配這個副詞來表示「已經」完成某事。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 在國王到達之前，勇敢的騎士已經擊敗了巨龍。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The little rabbit promised _______ silent in the bushes.
listeningStage2Data.hint: promise（承諾）後面要接「不定詞 (to + 原形動詞)」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 小兔子承諾會待在灌木叢裡保持安靜。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: Even though the clever fox won the race, he tried to remain _______.
listeningStage2Data.hint: remain 是連綴動詞，後面要形容「保持」某種狀態，需接形容詞「謙遜的」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 雖然聰明的狐狸贏得了比賽，但他努力保持謙遜。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The sneaky _______ tried to steal the golden apple from the castle.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這個名詞是指「竊賊」，想偷走城堡裡的黃金蘋果。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 那個鬼鬼祟祟的竊賊試圖偷走城堡裡的黃金蘋果。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The ancient monkeys lived in a beautiful _______ deep in the forest.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這個名詞指的是森林深處的「寺廟」或神殿。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 古老的猴子們住在森林深處一座美麗的寺廟裡。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The lazy wolf was _______ from school because he was sleeping all day.
listeningStage2Data.hint: be 結合這個形容詞表示「缺席的、沒來上課的」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 那隻懶惰的狼因為睡了一整天而沒來上課。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The young bear did not _______ that the honey bees were right behind him.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 助動詞 did 之後接原形動詞，表示「意識到、發覺」。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 小熊沒有意識到蜜蜂們就在他身後。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: The tiny mouse squeezed through the _______ under the wooden door.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這裡需要一個名詞表示門底下的「縫隙」或裂口。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 小老鼠擠過了木門底下的縫隙。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: Everyone in the magical village knows that the fairy has a great _______ for music.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這個名詞指的是「天賦、才華」，常與介系詞 for 連用。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 魔法村莊裡的每個人都知道那隻仙子有極高的音樂天賦。

listeningStage2Data.sentence: Strange things began to _______ in the haunted woods after midnight.
listeningStage2Data.hint: 這個動詞表示事情「發生」，在不定詞 to 之後要用原形。
listeningStage2Data.translation: 午夜過後，鬧鬼的森林裡開始發生奇怪的事情。

listeningStage3Data.title: The Silent Thief of the Temple (寺廟的安靜竊賊)

articleContent.en: The owl mayor of the animal forest stood in front of the ancient temple.
articleContent.zh: 動物森林的貓頭鷹市長站在古老的寺廟前。

articleContent.en: He announced that a sneaky thief had stolen the golden key.
articleContent.zh: 他宣布一個鬼鬼祟祟的竊賊偷走了黃金鑰匙。

articleContent.en: Everyone did not realize who did it because the forest was so quiet.
articleContent.zh: 大家沒有意識到是誰做的，因為森林如此安靜。

articleContent.en: "We must remain silent and wait for the thief to return," said the mayor.
articleContent.zh: 「我們必須保持安靜，等待竊賊回來，」市長說。

articleContent.en: Suddenly, they saw a shadow squeezing through a small gap in the wall.
articleContent.zh: 突然，他們看到一個影子擠過牆上的一個小縫隙。

articleContent.en: It was the mischievous squirrel, and he promised never to steal again.
articleContent.zh: 原來是那隻頑皮的松鼠，他承諾再也不偷東西了。

questions.question: Who stood in front of the temple?
Where did the story take place?
options: In front of the ancient temple
questions.correct: In front of the ancient temple

questions.question: What did the sneaky thief do?
When did the story happen?
options: When the forest was very quiet
questions.correct: When the forest was very quiet

questions.question: What did the squirrel squeeze through?
options: A small gap in the wall
questions.correct: A small gap in the wall

questions.question: Why did the squirrel make a promise to the mayor?
options: Because he was caught stealing the key
Because he wanted to be the new mayor
Because he wanted to live in the temple
questions.correct: Because he was caught stealing the key

listeningStage3Data.title: The Absent Partner at the Talent Show (才藝表演上缺席的夥伴)

articleContent.en: The annual animal talent show was about to begin in the forest.
articleContent.zh: 一年一度的動物才藝表演即將在森林裡開始。

articleContent.en: The little bear was already on stage, but his partner, the rabbit, was absent.
articleContent.zh: 小熊已經在舞台上了，但他的夥伴兔子卻缺席了。

articleContent.en: An unexpected problem began to occur when the music stopped playing.
articleContent.zh: 當音樂停止播放時，一個意想不到的問題開始發生。

articleContent.en: "Are you ready to sing your song alone?" asked the host.
articleContent.zh: 「你準備好要獨自唱你的歌了嗎？」主持人問。

articleContent.en: The bear took a small sample of honey to soothe his throat before singing.
articleContent.zh: 唱歌前，小熊吃了一小口蜂蜜樣品來舒緩喉嚨。

articleContent.en: He sang beautifully and showed everyone his wonderful musical talent.
articleContent.zh: 他唱得很美，向大家展示了他美妙的音樂天賦。

questions.question: Who was absent from the talent show?
Where did the annual talent show begin?
What unexpected problem occurred during the show?
When did the bear eat the honey sample?
What did the bear take to soothe his throat?
Why did the bear sing alone on stage?
options: Because he didn't want to share the prize
Because he was already ready to win

listeningStage3Data.title: The Humble Fox and the Golden Apple (謙遜的狐狸與黃金蘋果)

articleContent.en: A humble young fox lived quietly near the crystal river.
articleContent.zh: 一隻謙遜的年輕狐狸安靜地住在水晶河畔。

articleContent.en: He made a promise to the forest spirits to protect the golden apple.
articleContent.zh: 他向森林神靈許下承諾，會保護這顆黃金蘋果。

articleContent.en: He had to remain silent and watch the tree day and night.
articleContent.zh: 他必須保持安靜，日夜看守著這棵樹。

articleContent.en: One day, he realized that a dangerous shadow was approaching.
articleContent.zh: 一天，他意識到一個危險的影子正在逼近。

articleContent.en: The fox didn't run away but stood his ground bravely.
articleContent.zh: 狐狸沒有逃跑，而是勇敢地堅守陣地。

articleContent.en: The shadow was just a lost baby deer looking for its mother.
articleContent.zh: 那個影子其實只是一隻在尋找母親的迷路幼鹿。

questions.question: Who lived quietly near the crystal river?
Where did the young fox live?
options: On top of a high mountain

questions.question: What did the fox do when the shadow approached?
options: He ran away to find help
He hid behind the big tree

questions.question: When did the fox watch the tree?
What object did the fox promise to protect?
Why was the shadow approaching the tree?
options: Because a lost baby deer was looking for its mother
Because a hungry wolf wanted to eat the apple
Because a thief wanted to cut down the tree
questions.correct: Because a lost baby deer was looking for its mother

readingStage1Data.hint: have/has 之後常配這個副詞來表示「已經」完成某事。
readingStage1Data.translation: 在國王到達之前，勇敢的騎士已經擊敗了巨龍。

readingStage1Data.translation: 那隻懶惰的狼因為睡了一整天而沒來上課。

readingStage1Data.translation: 小熊沒有意識到蜜蜂們就在他身後。

readingStage1Data.translation: 小老鼠擠過了木門底下的縫隙。

readingStage1Data.sentence: Everyone in the magical village knows that the fairy has a great _______ for music.
readingStage1Data.hint: 這個名詞指的是「天賦、才華」，常與介系詞 for 連用。
readingStage1Data.translation: 魔法村莊裡的每個人都知道那隻仙子有極高的音樂天賦。

readingStage1Data.hint: 這個動詞表示事情「發生」，在不定詞 to 之後要用原形。
readingStage1Data.translation: 午夜過後，鬧鬼的森林裡開始發生奇怪的事情。

readingStage2Data.title: Aladdin and the Magic Temple
readingStage2Data.article: Aladdin was a poor boy who was taken to an ancient {{1}} in the desert. The evil wizard made a {{2}} to give Aladdin many treasures if he helped. However, Aladdin did not {{3}} that the wizard was actually planning to trap him. Aladdin got the lamp but was trapped inside when the entrance closed. He rubbed the lamp, and a powerful genie appeared to rescue him.

blanks.hint: 指的是沙漠中存放神燈的「古老寺廟」或神殿，為單數名詞。
blanks.translation: 阿拉丁是一個被帶到沙漠中古老寺廟的窮男孩。

blanks.hint: 巫師對他許下的「承諾」，動詞 make 與此名詞搭配。
blanks.translation: 邪惡的巫師許下承諾，如果阿拉丁幫忙，就給他許多寶藏。

blanks.hint: 助動詞 did 之後接原形動詞，表示「意識到」某個事實。
blanks.translation: 然而，阿拉丁並未意識到巫師其實正計畫要陷害他。

readingStage2Data.title: The Town Mouse and the Country Mouse
readingStage2Data.article: The country mouse visited his rich cousin, who lived like a {{1}} in a grand city house. They sat down to eat delicious cake and fresh cheese on a gold plate. Suddenly, a big cat entered, and they had to remain completely {{2}}. The country mouse felt like a terrified {{3}} hiding in the dark corner. He decided to go back to his quiet field, preferring peace to fancy food.

blanks.hint: 用來形容表哥在豪宅裡的生活像「市長」一樣奢華，為單數名詞。
blanks.translation: 鄉下老鼠拜訪了他的有錢表哥，表哥在城市的大房子裡過得像市長一樣。

blanks.hint: 連綴動詞 remain 後面需要形容詞，表示他們必須保持「安靜的」。
blanks.translation: 突然，一隻大貓進來了，他們必須保持完全安靜。

blanks.hint: 躲在角落裡害怕被抓，感覺像「竊賊」一樣，為單數名詞。
blanks.translation: 鄉下老鼠覺得自己就像一個躲在黑暗角落裡、飽受驚嚇的竊賊。

readingStage2Data.title: Cinderella and the Royal Ball
readingStage2Data.article: Cinderella wanted to go to the royal ball, but she was not {{1}} because her dress was dirty. Her fairy godmother appeared and made sure she would not be {{2}} from the party. The fairy godmother warned her that she must {{3}} humble and leave before midnight. Cinderella danced with the prince all night and forgot about the time. When the clock struck twelve, she ran away and dropped her glass slipper.

blanks.hint: 這裡表示主詞「準備好的」狀態，與 be 動詞連用。
blanks.translation: 灰姑娘想去參加皇家舞會，但因為她的裙子很髒，她還沒準備好。

blanks.hint: 這裡搭配 be 動詞，表示在派對中「缺席的」。
blanks.translation: 她的神仙教母出現了，確保她不會在派對中缺席。

blanks.hint: 助動詞 must 之後接原形動詞，表示「保持、維持」某種狀態。
blanks.translation: 神仙教母警告她，她必須保持謙遜，並在午夜前離開。

articleContent.en: Aladdin was a poor boy who was taken to an ancient temple in the desert.
articleContent.zh: 阿拉丁是一個被帶到沙漠中古老寺廟的窮男孩。

articleContent.en: The evil wizard made a promise to give Aladdin many treasures if he helped.
articleContent.zh: 邪惡的巫師許下承諾，如果阿拉丁幫忙，就給他許多寶藏。

articleContent.en: However, Aladdin did not realize that the wizard was actually planning to trap him.
articleContent.zh: 然而，阿拉丁並未意識到巫師其實正計畫要陷害他。

articleContent.en: Aladdin got the lamp but was trapped inside when the entrance closed.
articleContent.zh: 阿拉丁拿到了神燈，但當入口關閉時，他被困在裡面。

articleContent.en: He rubbed the lamp, and a powerful genie appeared to rescue him.
articleContent.zh: 他摩擦了神燈，一個強大的精靈出現並解救了他。

questions.question: Who took Aladdin to the ancient place?
Where was the temple located?
options: In the middle of a big city

questions.question: What did Aladdin find inside the temple?
When did the wizard trap Aladdin?
options: When the entrance of the temple closed
After the sun went down completely
questions.correct: When the entrance of the temple closed

questions.question: What did Aladdin rub to make the genie appear?
Why did the wizard make a promise to Aladdin?
options: To trick him into getting the lamp
To help him buy food for his mother
To teach him how to use magic
questions.correct: To trick him into getting the lamp

readingStage3Data.title: The Town Mouse and the Country Mouse

articleContent.en: The country mouse visited his rich cousin, who lived like a mayor in a grand city house.
articleContent.zh: 鄉下老鼠拜訪了他的有錢表哥，表哥在城市的大房子裡過得像市長一樣。

articleContent.en: They sat down to eat delicious cake and fresh cheese on a gold plate.
articleContent.zh: 他們坐下來，在金盤子上享用美味的蛋糕和新鮮的起司。

articleContent.en: Suddenly, a big cat entered, and they had to remain completely silent.
articleContent.zh: 突然，一隻大貓進來了，他們必須保持完全安靜。

articleContent.en: The country mouse felt like a terrified thief hiding in the dark corner.
articleContent.zh: 鄉下老鼠覺得自己就像一個躲在黑暗角落裡、飽受驚嚇的竊賊。

articleContent.en: He decided to go back to his quiet field, preferring peace to fancy food.
articleContent.zh: 他決定回到自己安靜的田野，比起奢華的食物，他更喜歡和平。

questions.question: Who did the country mouse visit?
Where did the rich cousin live?
What did they do before the cat arrived?
options: They fell asleep on the floor

questions.question: When did they have to remain silent?
options: When a big cat entered the room
When the sun started to rise
Before they sat down to eat
questions.correct: When a big cat entered the room

questions.question: What did they eat their food on?
Why did the country mouse decide to go back to the field?
options: Because he preferred peace to fancy food
Because his cousin was mean to him
Because the cat ate all the food
questions.correct: Because he preferred peace to fancy food

articleContent.en: Cinderella wanted to go to the royal ball, but she was not ready because her dress was dirty.
articleContent.zh: 灰姑娘想去參加皇家舞會，但因為她的裙子很髒，她還沒準備好。

articleContent.en: Her fairy godmother appeared and made sure she would not be absent from the party.
articleContent.zh: 她的神仙教母出現了，確保她不會在派對中缺席。

articleContent.en: The fairy godmother warned her that she must remain humble and leave before midnight.
articleContent.zh: 神仙教母警告她，她必須保持謙遜，並在午夜前離開。

articleContent.en: Cinderella danced with the prince all night and forgot about the time.
articleContent.zh: 灰姑娘和王子跳了一整晚的舞，忘記了時間。

articleContent.en: When the clock struck twelve, she ran away and dropped her glass slipper.
articleContent.zh: 當鐘敲了十二下時，她跑開並掉落了她的玻璃鞋。

questions.question: Who helped Cinderella go to the ball?
Where did the grand ball take place?
What did Cinderella do with the prince?
options: She danced with him all night
questions.correct: She danced with him all night

questions.question: When did Cinderella have to leave the party?
options: When the sun started to rise

questions.question: What did Cinderella drop when she ran away?
Why was Cinderella not ready for the ball at first?
options: Because she was sleeping all day
Because she had to clean the kitchen
